name: pitchpulse
description: Hyper-local cricket scoring and tournament management platform

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.build:backend: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run db:generate -w backend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
